Normalized encoding artifacts (mojibake) to standard German characters (e.g., Bücher, 4to., 8vo., Stähelins, Eydgnosschafft, ß.). Corrected OCR errors in titles (Homer, Ilias, Odys.). Removed invalid separator characters.
